name: BofA / Merrill
ai_strategy_summary: The longest-running AI program in wealth management, backed by $13.5 billion in annual technology spend ($4 billion on new initiatives including AI). Erica, launched in 2018, has crossed 3.2 billion total interactions with 20.6 million active users — the largest consumer AI estate in banking. BofA extended the same underlying technology to advisor-facing tools: Ask Merrill and Ask Private Banking for knowledge retrieval, and the AI-Powered Meeting Journey (March 2026) for end-to-end meeting automation across all 25,000 Merrill and Private Bank advisors. The bank processed 30 billion digital client interactions in 2025, growing 14% YoY, with 86% of wealth management clients now engaging digitally. In 2026, BofA is shifting to agentic AI — proactively recommending savings, fee reductions, and cash-flow optimisation rather than waiting for client queries.
headline_metric: 3.2B Erica interactions total; 30B digital touchpoints in 2025 (14% YoY); 25,000 advisors on AI Meeting Journey; $13.5B annual tech spend
headline_initiative: Erica + Ask Merrill + Ask Private Banking + AI-Powered Meeting Journey

advisor_productivity.headline: AI Meeting Journey: full-scale rollout across 25,000 Merrill and Private Bank advisors, up to 4 hours saved per meeting
advisor_productivity.detail: BofA launched the AI-Powered Meeting Journey on March 26, 2026, automating three core advisor workflow steps: pre-meeting client preparation, real-time meeting note-taking (with client consent), and post-meeting task generation. The tool runs across all 25,000 Merrill advisors in 500+ offices. Ask Merrill provides AI-powered knowledge retrieval for advisors, with 23,000 monthly active users. The productivity claim of up to 4 hours saved per meeting is a vendor estimate — BofA has not disclosed measured adoption rates or verified time savings.
evidence: AI-Powered Meeting Journey launched March 26, 2026 across all Merrill and Private Bank advisors (BofA Newsroom)
25,000 advisors across 500+ offices (BofA press release via PR Newswire)
Up to 4 hours saved per client meeting — vendor estimate, not independently verified (BofA press release)
Ask Merrill: 23,000 monthly active advisors, 10,000+ Q&A answers per month (BofA Newsroom)
Meeting prep, real-time AI note-taking, automated post-meeting follow-ups (American Banker coverage)

client_personalization.headline: Erica: 3.2B interactions, 20.6M users, 676M interactions in 2025 with ~95% accuracy
client_personalization.detail: Erica is the largest consumer AI assistant in banking. Launched in 2018, it has surpassed 3.2 billion total interactions with 20.6 million monthly active users. In 2025, Erica handled 676 million interactions with approximately 95% accuracy, delivering 24/7 personalised financial guidance. $211 billion in AI-linked asset growth demonstrates direct revenue impact. In 2026, BofA is evolving Erica toward agentic AI — proactively recommending savings, fee reductions, and cash-flow fixes rather than responding to client queries.
evidence: 3.2 billion total interactions, 20.6 million monthly active users (BofA Newsroom, March 2026)
676 million interactions in 2025 with ~95% accuracy (Klover.ai analysis citing BofA disclosures)
$211 billion AUM in accounts where Erica is used — not growth attributable to AI alone (BofA Newsroom)
30 billion total digital interactions in 2025, 14% YoY growth (PR Newswire)
86% of wealth management clients engage digitally (BofA press release)
2026: shifting to agentic AI for proactive recommendations (CIO.com coverage)

client_acquisition.headline: Erica proactive insights driving 20.6M monthly active users across deposits and investments
client_acquisition.detail: Erica proactively surfaces insights on spending patterns, bill reminders, and investment opportunities, driving engagement across the full banking relationship. The tool's ability to connect deposits, lending, and investment accounts creates cross-sell opportunities that independent RIA AI tools structurally cannot replicate — they see only the investment account, while BofA sees the full household picture.
evidence: 20.6 million monthly active users on Erica (BofA Newsroom)
Proactive insights on spending, bills, and investments (product documentation)
Cross-sell advantage: deposits + lending + investments in single view (Datos Insights analysis)

operations_compliance.headline: AI-powered post-meeting workflow automation + agentic AI for internal operations
operations_compliance.detail: The AI Meeting Journey automates post-meeting task generation and follow-up scheduling. In 2026, BofA is moving AI into core internal operations with agentic AI that proactively recommends process improvements. The bank's $13.5 billion annual technology spend funds continued infrastructure investment.
evidence: Post-meeting task automation in AI Meeting Journey (BofA press release)
Agentic AI for internal operations in 2026 (PYMNTS coverage)
$13.5B annual tech spend, $4B on new initiatives (Klover.ai analysis)
